meta.title: Aura Home — Where Technology Disappears
meta.description: The best technology is invisible. Ambient intelligence for your home.

props.heading: The best technology is invisible
props.subheading: Aura Home orchestrates light, temperature, and sound to create spaces that respond to your presence without demanding your attention.

props.heading: Comfort without complexity
props.subheading: When technology demands attention, it becomes noise. The most profound innovations are those you never notice.

features.title: Ambient Intelligence
features.description: Sensors perceive. Systems respond smoothly to your natural rhythms.

features.title: Responsive Lighting
features.description: Color temperature matches the sun, regulating your circadian rhythm.

features.title: Invisible Control
features.description: No apps necessary. The home learns your patterns directly.

features.title: Absolute Privacy
features.description: All processing happens locally. No microphones, no cloud data.

items.title: Reading Mode: Focused Warmth
items.description: Aura gently dims ambient lighting while directing warm 2700K light to your book. Temperature adjusts to 21°C.

items.title: Bathing Mode: Evening Unwind
items.description: Warm amber light replaces bright daylight, steam-friendly speakers play soft ambient tones, and floor heating activates.

items.title: Sleep Mode: Natural Descent
items.description: Lights gradually dim to simulate sunset, temperature cools to 18°C, and subtle white noise fills the space.

items.title: Ambient Sensing Network
items.description: 24 types of sensors passing 10K data points per second over a 128-node mesh.

items.title: Lighting Intelligence
items.description: Unlimited zones with 1800-6500K color control and 98+ CRI.

testimonials.quote: I stopped reaching for light switches perfectly within 48 hours. The house just knows.
testimonials.name: Elena Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: The way the light warms up automatically as the evening progresses has completely fixed my sleep.
testimonials.name: Marcus Chen

testimonials.quote: It feels less like a smart home and more like an organism that takes care of you.
testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins

props.heading: Begin the invisible transformation
props.subheading: Experience Aura Home in your space. Our consultants visit your home to understand your rhythms and design a system that disappears into your life.
